one_time_description: Subsequent to year-end, the First Nation received their share of the compensation from the Robinson Huron Treaty settlement between the Government of Canada and the Province of Ontario
economic_notes: GBEs include Odawa Stone Limited Partnership (stone quarry) and Odawa Freshwater Limited Partnership (25% interest in Odawa Island Farm LP). Business partnerships include UCCM Building Material Supply LP (14.28%), M'Nidoo M'Nising Power LP (16.665%, electrical power generation), and Great Lakes Hospitality Group LP (11.75%, accommodation/restaurant/catering). FedNor funding of $760,887 received. Letters of credit of $107,884 granted to Hydro One for overhead powerline installation.
notes: Robinson Huron Treaty settlement of $236.7M received subsequent to year-end (not reflected in FY2024 financials). Four GBEs accounted for by modified equity method (Odawa Stone LP, Odawa Stone GP, Odawa Freshwater LP, Odawa Freshwater GP). Three business partnerships also on modified equity (UCCMLP, MMPLP, GLHGLP). Odawa Stone LP reported a loss of $458,993 in 2024. CMHC advance of $1,216,360 for Phase 7 construction included in long-term debt. No schedule of remuneration provided. total_government_transfers calculated as Federal ($5,500,625) + Provincial ($1,671,326) + Kinoomaadziwin Education Body ($2,188,689) = $9,360,640. OSR calculated as total revenue $11,572,625 minus government transfers $9,360,640 = $2,211,985. Segmented salaries total from 2024 schedule: $3,540,871.
